scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --local --file ./migrations/0001_auth.sql && wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --local --file ./migrations/0002_partner_settings.sql
scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --env staging --remote --file ./migrations/0001_auth.sql && wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --env staging --remote --file ./migrations/0002_partner_settings.sql
scripts.migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --remote --file ./migrations/0001_auth.sql && wrangler d1 execute AUTH_DB --remote --file ./migrations/0002_partner_settings.sql
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run migrate:staging && wrangler deploy --env staging --minify
